endpoints.name: List additions
endpoints.description:
Get the latest additions.

This endpoint only shows unchanged objects.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PANDASCORE_API_KEY}} with your PANDASCORE API KEY.

endpoints.name: List changes
endpoints.description:
Get the latest updates.

This endpoint only provides the latest change for an object. It does not keep track of previous changes.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PANDASCORE_API_KEY}} with your PANDASCORE API KEY.

endpoints.name: List deletions
endpoints.description: Get the latest deleted documents
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PANDASCORE_API_KEY}} with your PANDASCORE API KEY.

endpoints.name: List changes, additions and deletions
endpoints.description:
Get the latest updates and additions.

This endpoint only provides the latest incident for an object. It does not keep track of previous incidents.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{PANDASCORE_API_KEY}} with your PANDASCORE API KEY.

endpoints.description: List leagues

endpoints.description: Get a single league by ID or by slug

endpoints.notes: Replace {{PANDASCORE_API_KEY}} with your PANDASCORE API KEY. Replace {{LEAGUE_ID_OR_SLUG}} with a real league_id_or_slug.
